news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.
GraniteShares Expands YieldBOOST(TM) Platform with Four New Sector and Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST 20Y+ Treasuries ETF (FIYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio. It seeks weekly income from writing put options on a 3x leveraged ETF that tracks the daily performance of the ICE US Treasury 20+ Year Bond Index FIYY was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.
data.text: New York, June 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the weekly distributions for its GraniteShares YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HO...
